source_declaration.name: Multiset.card
source_declaration.source_snippet:
def card : Multiset α → ℕ := Quot.lift length fun _l₁ _l₂ => Perm.length_eq

source_declaration.declaration_line: theorem card_map (f : α → β) (s) : card (map f s) = card s :=
source_declaration.name: Multiset.card_map
source_declaration.source_snippet:
@[simp]
theorem card_map (f : α → β) (s) : card (map f s) = card s :=
  Quot.inductionOn s fun _ => length_map _

source_declaration.declaration_line: theorem filter_le (s : Multiset α) : filter p s ≤ s :=
source_declaration.name: Multiset.filter_le
source_declaration.source_snippet:
@[simp]
theorem filter_le (s : Multiset α) : filter p s ≤ s :=
  Quot.inductionOn s fun _l => filter_sublist.subperm

source_declaration.declaration_line: theorem card_le_card {s t : Multiset α} (h : s ≤ t) : card s ≤ card t :=
source_declaration.name: Multiset.card_le_card
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem card_le_card {s t : Multiset α} (h : s ≤ t) : card s ≤ card t :=
  leInductionOn h Sublist.length_le
